resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an audit trail of who changed what and when. However, the evidence provided does not include any records or logs that capture changes made to the system, such as who made the changes or when they occurred. The linked use case explicitly states the need for an audit trail, but without any supporting evidence, this requirement remains unfulfilled.
gaps: No evidence of an audit trail capturing changes made by users.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
